mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_chemical_warehouse WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_chemical_warehouse WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_chemical_warehouse WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT * FROM tb_chemical_warehouse WHERE deleted = 0
AND (warehouse_code LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR warehouse_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR location LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_chemical_warehouse ( warehouse_code, warehouse_name, storage_type, location, stored_items_count, total_stock, temperature, humidity, status, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{warehouseCode}, #{warehouseName}, #{storageType}, #{location}, #{storedItemsCount}, #{totalStock}, #{temperature}, #{humidity}, #{status}, #{deleted}, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_chemical_warehouse SET warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode}, warehouse_name = #{warehouseName}, storage_type = #{storageType}, location = #{location}, stored_items_count = #{storedItemsCount}, total_stock = #{totalStock}, temperature = #{temperature}, humidity = #{humidity}, status = #{status}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_chemical_warehouse SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
